title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 469.330 - Cases not provided for in law
text:
469.330.  Cases not provided for in law. — In any case not provided for in sections 469.240 to 469.350 the rules of law and equity, including the law merchant and those rules of law and equity relating to trusts, agency, negotiable instruments and banking, shall continue to apply.
(L. 1959 S.B. 121 § 11, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1511) 
Transferred 2004; formerly 456.330
